name: Shoals Technologies Group, Inc.
summary: Unless the context otherwise requires or unless otherwise stated, references to we, us, our, Shoals, the Corporation, the Company and other similar references refer to Shoals Technologies Group, Inc., a Delaware corporation, and, unless otherwise stated, all of its consolidated subsidiaries. Shares of our Class A common stock trade on the Nasdaq Global Market under the symbol, SHLS.
